title: Minimax M3 (Fully Tested) + FULLY FREE API: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
summary: MiniMax M3 is a coding and agentic frontier model featuring one million token context, native multimodality, tool support, and free access via OpenCode. In benchmark testing across coding, UI, math, and agentic tasks, it achieved 35.71% on the Verdent benchmark, outperforming DeepSeek V4 Pro and Gemini 3.5 Flash but trailing GPT-5.5 and Opus variants.
